scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core value proposition visually without audio.
- Positions the app as a career-boosting, practical alternative to expensive traditional tutors.
- Drives immediate action with a clear call-to-action tailored to workplace confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
महंगे ट्यूटर से बेहतर। आपके करियर के लिए बेस्ट। [Better than an expensive tutor. Best for your career.]
रोज़ AI के साथ practice करें। ऑफिस में confidence से बोलें। [Practice daily with AI. Speak with confidence in the office.]
TRY SUPERNOVA
